ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus
ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.text: These things I have written to you by Crescens, whom up to the present time I have recommended unto you, and do now recommend.
For he has acted blamelessly among us, and I believe also among you.
Moreover, ye will hold his sister in esteem when she comes to you.
Be ye safe in the Lord Jesus Christ.
